calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-06-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Susan Parkinson, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff SF BAY PARTNERS LLC.,
Witness Henry Tang sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant TAMARA PREISICK.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-20 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 640 Clay Street #236, San Francisco, California 94111, San Francisco.

Damages $2100.00
Holdover damages $2850.00
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $390.00
For a Total Judgment of $5340.00

Judgment signed in open court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-06-2017 Assigned To Trial Court
